notes: These Google Drive files are read-only source artifacts for rebuilding local dashboard data.
Normal GitHub collaboration does not require Qwen or crawling; semantic outputs are already inside these artifacts.
Do not edit extracted data files by hand. Change frontend code, statistical computation code, or figure-generation code instead.

artifacts.name: baseline_runs_full
artifacts.description: Completed per-channel run artifacts used to rebuild benchmark/dashboard outputs.
